rationale: Surface: arithmetic overflow `size = nex * sizeof(int)` flagged by CodeQL as uncontrolled-allocation-size. The very next downstream check `if (size < 0 || size > 4096) return -1;` rejects unsafe sizes. Axis 8 detects this pattern: var name `size` extracted from sink snippet; forward scan finds `if (... size ...)` with relational `<`/`>` + early-exit `return` within 6 lines. Verdict NOT_EXPLOITABLE.
